  "findings": [
    "Schrader cores left in during evacuation (SEQ)",
    "Incomplete evacuation / high vacuum restriction",
    "Potential moisture and non-condensables trapped in system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Recover refrigerant",
    "Replace filter drier",
    "Remove Schrader cores using core removal tool",
    "Evacuate system to under 500 microns",
    "Recharge system to manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "Leaving Schrader cores in during evacuation severely restricts flow, making it extremely difficult to pull a deep, clean vacuum and effectively remove moisture and non-condensables. This leads to system degradation, acid formation, and premature compressor failure.",
  "references": [
    "EPA Section 608",
    "ACCA Quality Installation Standards",
    "Manufacturer Installation Instructions"
  ]
